name: [ECHOSTASIS]
short_description: THE AWARD-WINNING CONCLUSION TO THE [ENIGMA] TRILOGY, [ECHOSTASIS] presents a world where our reality is not only curated by algorithms, but created by them.
detailed_description:
THE FINAL CHAPTER IN THE ENIGMA TRILOGY, CONCLUDING THE STORY OF THE ENIGMA MACHINE (2018) AND MOTHERED - A ROLE-PLAYING HORROR GAME (2021).

SAY [HELLO] TO THE [NEW YOU]

An exploration of reality, technology, and our place between them - [ECHOSTASIS] is an award-winning science-fiction horror first-person shooter with puzzle elements which acts as the climactic conclusion to the THE ENIGMA TRILOGY, offering an ever-evolving [STORY] possible through the medium of games.

[WHO ARE YOU]?

In [ECHOSTASIS] You Play The [ROLE] of the [ADMINISTRATOR] inside [ENIGMA]'s [HEADQUARTERS], just as a [VIRUS] has been uploaded to [HER] - an [ALGORITHM] that creates personalized realities known as [ECHOES]. It is your [JOB] is to delve into the minds of three key [SUBJECTS] who have become lost in the [CLOUD]. Use the [TERMINAL] to gather your [THOUGHTS] about [WHAT HAPPENED], by typing in any words you see in brackets [LIKE THIS].

[[DREAMSCAPE] EXPLORER]

Your [JOB] is to delve into the minds of each lost [SUBJECT] and figure out [WHAT HAPPENED] to them.

As you can only spend limited time in the [DREAMSCAPE], you must use your time wisely to open shortcuts to new [PATHS] and weapons that will let you delve deeper into these lost [SUBJECTS] minds. Only once you face the horrors that await in each [SUBJECTS] [DREAMSCAPE] can you [HELP] bring them [HOME].

𝕋ℍ𝕀ℕ𝔾𝕊 𝔻𝕆ℕ'𝕋 𝕄𝔸𝕂𝔼 𝕊𝔼ℕ𝕊𝔼 𝔸ℕ𝕐𝕄𝕆ℝ𝔼,

𝔹𝕌𝕋 𝕎𝔼'ℝ𝔼 𝔾𝕆𝕀ℕ𝔾 𝕋𝕆 𝕄𝔸𝕂𝔼 𝕋ℍ𝕀𝕊 ℝ𝕀𝔾ℍ𝕋.

FEATURING

  • A seamless blend of puzzles, exploration and combat set within an entirely unique presentation.

  • Navigate the minds of your [SUBJECTS] as they slip further into [ECHOSTASIS].

  • Gain a better understanding of [WHAT HAPPENED] around the events of THE ENIGMA MACHINE (2018) and MOTHERED - A ROLE-PLAYING HORROR GAME (2021)

  • Embrace the [NEW YOU] with an open-ended keyword system via the fully interactive [TERMINAL].

  • Lose Your[SELF] within a mind bending conclusion to a [STORY] that will keep you guessing until the very [END].
    ⎵
